room.caption: [26_Ext] So what happens is you see the Game Over screen a lot and then get mad at the creator.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(26)
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh7MainA)
backGrad=instance_create(0,0,oCh7GradientBack) backGrad.type=1 backGrad.colorTop=make_color_rgb(0,0,144) backGrad.yStart=184
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(7) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)
